content.reviewer_comment_en: Please correct the text to use the standard format: CD4+T cells and CD8+T cells, the plus sign (+) indicating positive expression should be formatted as a superscript.
content.reviewer_intent_zh: 审稿人核心关切：Please correct the text to use the standard format: CD4+T cells and CD8+T cells, the plus sign (+) indicating positive expression should be formatted as a superscript.
content.reviewer_intent_en: Interpretation: The reviewer is requesting a clear, evidence-aligned clarification and a concrete manuscript-level correction for this specific point.
content.response_en: Thank you for this helpful suggestion. We have revised the relevant text or figure presentation accordingly and rechecked consistency across the manuscript.
content.response_zh: 中文对应：感谢审稿人意见。我们已针对该问题完成对应修订，并确保结论与证据保持一致。
content.revision_location_en: Section: 2.4 Immunohistochemistry (IHC) and Immunofluorescence | Paragraph index: 40
content.original_excerpt_en: The immunofluorescence protocol maintained consistency with IHC methodology during initial processing stages. Following antigen retrieval, sections were subjected to blocking treatment with 5% goat serum (16210064, Fisher Scientific, USA) to minimize non-specific binding. The experimental sequence proceeded with application of the specified primary antibodies: anti-Prdx1 (8499, Cell Signaling Technology,, 1:100); anti-NF-κB (8242, Cell Signaling Technology, 1:100); anti-CD206 (18704-1-AP, Proteintech, 1:200); anti-CD80 (104754, BioLegend, 1:100); anti-iNOS (A3774, Abclonal, 1:200); anti-CD68 (97778S, Cell Signaling Technology, 1:100); anti-cleaved caspase 3 (abs132005, Absin, 1:100); anti-Ly6G (127625, BioLegand, 1:50); anti-GPX4 (A1933, Abclonal, 1:100); anti-LC3 (14600-1-AP, Proteintech, 1:250); anti-HIF-1-α (abs120168, absin, 1:100); anti-NRF2 (absin, Abclonal, 1:100); anti-SP-1 (A19649, Abclonal, 1:200); anti-MOF (A3390, Abclonal, 1:100); anti-cleaved caspase 1 (AF4022, Affinity, 1:100).

modification_actions.reason: 审稿人指出表述或图文一致性问题，需定点修订。

notes_core_zh: 针对该条意见完成规范化修订（术语、图注、编号或排版），并逐项核对对应位置。
notes_support_zh: 进行全文一致性校对，避免同类细节问题重复出现。

images.caption: 请替换为修订后图片（如有）
